description: Scalable Vector Graphics - an XML-based vector image format for two-dimensional graphics. SVG files begin with either an <svg root element directly or an <?xml declaration followed by the <svg element. SVGZ files are gzip-compressed SVG.
author: WPFHexaEditor Team

functions.extractASCIIString: Extract SVG XML content and tag attributes as ASCII text
functions.extractUTF8String: Extract Unicode text content from SVG elements
functions.detectBOM: Detect byte order mark that may precede the XML/SVG content

blocks.name: SVG Opening Tag
blocks.description: Opening <svg tag (hex 3C 73 76 67). May be preceded by an <?xml declaration in which case detection falls back to maxSignatureOffset search.

blocks.name: SVG Tag Attributes Region
blocks.description: Region capturing the SVG root element attributes such as xmlns, viewBox, width, and height. Actual length varies per file; this captures a typical opening.

UseCases: Interactive web graphics and data visualizations
